Lebanon faces a historic test between two strategic paths: 1. The Path of Resistance: Unity of Fronts from the Strait of Hormuz to the Mediterranean. It creates deterrence, blocks "Greater Israel," and offers a broad strategic umbrella. 2. The Path of Normalization: Negotiation under fire without leverage, relying on US promises. 15 months of failure, martyred soldiers, destroyed villages, and zero reconstruction prove its bankruptcy. The enemy's goal is clear: "Separating the Fronts." Occupying the South, pushing to the Litani River, and imposing Biblical claims. Normalization plays directly into this plan. Lebanon's government must reconsider. Negotiating without the Resistance Axis leaves

R to @DXBMediaOffice: Mattar Al Tayer, Director General, Chairman of the Board of Executive Directors of RTA: We ensured that the new shelters combine modern, attractive design with integrated services that enhance the mobility experience, strengthen public confidence in the public transport system, and support sustainability objectives, including reducing emissions. The shelters serve a large number of bus routes — sometimes over ten routes per shelter — which improves network efficiency, cuts travel time, and boosts public transport ridership.

Dubai’s Roads and Transport Authority Completes a project involving the installation of 726 modern bus shelters for public transport riders, distributed across key areas of the emirate. The new shelters serve more than 192 million riders annually. Some shelters are linked to more than 10 bus routes, enhancing network flexibility and raising operational efficiency.

Mattar Al Tayer, Director General, Chairman of the Board of Executive Directors of RTA: We ensured that the new shelters combine modern, attractive design with integrated services that enhance the mobility experience, strengthen public confidence in the public transport system, and support sustainability objectives, including reducing emissions. ⭕️DISMANTLED: An explosives manufacturing lab in Tulkarem, following an intelligence indication.

During the activity, IDF soldiers located:
• IEDs, including ~200 pipe bombs
• Fire extinguishers intended to be used as explosive charges attached to vehicles
• Large gas cylinders with the potential to be used as under-vehicle explosive devices
• 50+ kilograms of improvised explosive material

The explosives made in the lab were intended to target IDF soldiers operating in Judea & Samaria and to be used for carrying out terror attacks against Israeli civilians.
⭕️DISMANTLED: A rocket launcher positioned and ready to launch toward Israel in the area of Jouaiyya in southern Lebanon. The launcher was struck before the launch could be carried out.

Informed Iranian source on Iran-US talks: 🔺 Iran presented reasonable initiatives and proposals during the talks; the ball is now in America’s court to approach the issues realistically. 🔺 Just as the US government failed in its war calculations, it has so far also miscalculated in the negotiations. 🔺 Iran is in no rush, and unless the US agrees to a reasonable deal, there will be no change in the situation of the Strait of Hormuz. 🔺 For now, no time or place has been set for a possible next round of talks.

Iran FM Spox.: I thank the government and people of Pakistan, and Mr. Shehbaz Sharif, the Prime Minister of Pakistan, Mr. Asim Munir, the Chief of Army Staff, and Mr. Ishaq Dar, the Deputy Prime Minister. We thank them for their gracious hospitality, and we are confident that…

Iran FM Spox.: Another point was the complexity of the issues and the circumstances. Some new issues, such as the issue of the Strait of Hormuz, were added in these negotiations, and each of these has its own complexity. Under any circumstances, we in the diplomatic apparatus must pursue the rights and interests of the Iranian people.

Iran FM Spox.: These negotiations took place after 40 days of imposed war and were conducted in an atmosphere of mistrust and suspicion; it is natural that, from the beginning, we should not have expected to reach an agreement within a single session. No one had such an expectation either.
Iran FM Spox.: Diplomacy never ends. This is a tool for safeguarding national interests. Diplomats must carry out their duty both in times of war and in times of peace.

✈️ Within a minute, the IDF eliminated 180+ Hezbollah terrorists in 3 areas simultaneously in a large-scale strike based on precise and high-quality intelligence.

~100 targets were struck simultaneously across Beirut, the Beqaa, and southern Lebanon, including main command centers, military structures used by Hezbollah commanders and multiple terror infrastructure sites used by top Hezbollah operatives.

Prior to the strikes, steps were taken to mitigate harm to uninvolved civilians as much as possible, including using precise ammunition and aerial surveillance.
